{{Quote|Hiya folks. I'm G2-4T. I run this operation. Now if there's anything I can help you with...|G2-4T|<ref name="Star Tours (real-world)" />}}
'''G2-4T''' was a [[G2 repair droid/Legends|G2 repair droid]] that worked for the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency. He claimed G2-4T was short for G2-4TT45579982DWP-40PST, which was just his first name.<ref name="Star Tours: The Adventures Continue">''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]''</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|In order to keep you safe, I have been programmed to recognize all forms of suspicious human behaviors, including sweating, blinking, talking, laughing, and breathing. Hmm. You're all acting very suspicious.|G2-4T|<ref name="Star Tours: The Adventures Continue" />}}
During the early stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], G2-4T acted as a security officer manning the thermal scanning area of [[Spaceport THX1138]]. In order to ensure the safety of the passengers, he also was programmed to recognize suspicious behavior within Humans, including sweating, blinking, talking, laughing, and breathing. However, the programming performed too well, causing the G2 droid to be overzealous in suspicion regarding passengers. He often made small talk with tourists and passengers as they passed his security station, but he had a surly attitude towards coworkers and passengers, much to his superiors' dismay.<ref name="Star Tours: The Adventures Continue" />

By the time of the [[Battle of Death Star III]], G2-4T served as the foreman of the repair droids in the [[Droidnostics Center]] at the [[Tomorrowland Starport]]. He maintained his surly attitude, often talking back to his supervisor and making fun of passing guests.<ref name="Star Tours (real-world)" /> He continued his work up to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] when the agency went out of business. After the company closed, the droid found work with [[Talon Karrde]].<ref name="NEGD" />

==Behind the scenes==
This droid first appeared in the queue of the original [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] attraction. [[Hasbro]] released G2-4T as an exclusive [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] action figure, which was sold only in [[Disneyland]].<ref name="Star Tours (real-world)" /> He was voiced by Imagineer [[Mike West]], who served as the ride's show producer.<ref name="Taking Off">{{InsiderCite|104|Star Tours: Taking Off on a Star Tour|''Star Tours'': Taking Off on a Star Tour}}</ref>

In ''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'', he was recast as a security officer and his voice is provided by [[Patrick Warburton]].<ref name="9 Facts">{{D23|url=9-out-of-this-world-facts-about-star-tours-30-years-of-continued-adventures|text=9 Out of This World Facts about Star Tours' Over 30 Years of Continued Adventures}}</ref>
